name: post_status
description: Publish a new status (toot) to the authenticated user's Mastodon account. Supports text content, content warnings (spoiler text), visibility settings, media attachments, polls, and reply threading.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The text content of the status (max 500 characters on most instances).
parameters.example: Hello Fediverse! Excited to share this update.

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: Visibility of the status. One of: public, unlisted, private, direct.

parameters.name: spoiler_text
parameters.description: Content warning text displayed above the status. Hides content behind a click-to-reveal.

parameters.name: in_reply_to_id
parameters.description: ID of the status being replied to, for threading conversations.

parameters.name: media_ids
parameters.description: Array of media attachment IDs to include (uploaded via /api/v2/media first).

parameters.name: sensitive
parameters.description: Whether attached media should be marked as sensitive (blurred by default).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the status content.

body.status: Hello Fediverse! Excited to share this update.

body.content: Hello Fediverse! Excited to share this update.
